description_long: This traffic barricade is constructed from a robust metal frame with a rectangular grid pattern, featuring vertical bars and two wide, flat support feet at the base for stability. The front side displays a prominent yellow panel adorned with various black warning symbols and text, indicating caution and hazard information. The metal surface is weathered, showing signs of rust and wear, suggesting prolonged outdoor use. The yellow panel is partially obscured by dirt and scratches, further emphasizing its utilitarian, industrial character. The rear side of the barricade reveals the same yellow panel but without visible signage, and the structure is open, allowing visibility through the bars. The overall design is utilitarian, intended to restrict access and provide clear visual warnings in urban environments.
description: A weathered metal traffic barricade with a yellow warning panel featuring black hazard symbols and text, supported by two sturdy feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow warning panel with black symbols and text, framed by vertical metal bars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile and the depth of the support feet, with minimal panel visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the yellow panel and the open grid structure, with no visible signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow profile and support feet.
attribute_warning_signage: yellow panel with black hazard symbols and text, front center
